svg.text: ARTIST 2 -- GROUND CONTACT IS THE ANIMAL
Nine locomotions, nine bottom edges. Judge the silhouette strip below first: it is the gate.
THE GATE -- ALL NINE IN PURE BLACK SILHOUETTE, AT 32 px AND AT 18 px, BOTH FRAMES
The halo dilated union, exactly as the game rasterizes it. Nine different animals, or this cast has failed.
V split feet / nothing, tail in air / one flat slab / one soft foot / three prongs in air / side spikes / two feet, big hole / two frog feet + arch / four columns, open sky
round head / swept wings / two arm towers + U notch / leaning crown / dome / narrow S / antenna V / low dome / flat deck + cargo pod
SIZE LADDER -- 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall, on panel and on terrain
4x INSPECTION -- 80 x 128, four times game size. Editing view only. Nothing is approved here.
MULE: no head, no neck, no face. A chassis, four legs, open sky underneath.
MATRIX -- 9 creatures x 4 player colors x 3 backgrounds, all at 32 px tall (true game size)
The hard case is green player #3aaa18 on green terrain: the body fill dies and the double rim carries the shape.
DOCK BADGE -- the face crop symbols at 18 px, the size the auction dock actually draws
Eight crops. The mule has no face and ships no badge. Below each: the same crop at 72 px so a human can check what the crop contains.
